summary: Iteration 31 - Bloco 3 (Materiais Utilizados + Movimentação de Estoque + alterado_por) VALIDATED end-to-end. Backend pytest 12/12 PASS. Frontend Playwright 6/6 UI checks PASS. POST /api/ordens-servico/{id}/materiais deducts stock and returns full doc (codigo, descricao, quantidade, unidade, local_estoque, usuario_nome, ativo_tag, os_numero, custo_total). DELETE restores stock and records 'devolucao' movement. GET /api/movimentacoes returns enriched movements with correct fields and supports filters (item_id, ativo_id, usuario_id, os_id, tipo). Blocks: negative stock 400, missing item_estoque_id 400, qty<=0 400. Audit log records material_consumo and material_devolucao. PUT /api/ordens-servico/{id} stamps alterado_por and GET returns alterado_por_nome. Frontend OS detail page shows os-materiais-section, add-material-btn, material-select, material-quantidade, material-submit, and 'Última alteração por' label.

ui_bugs.issue: Displays 'Almox UI None None' when prateleira/posicao are stored as null. Backend formatter in work_orders.py:381 uses f-string '{item.get("prateleira","")}' which returns None (not the default empty string) when the key exists with null value, producing the literal text 'None'.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <option> caused by Emergent dev instrumentation (x-component tracer adds <span> wrapper around dynamic text). Likely dev-only artifact (not app code), but worth verifying does not affect prod build.

action_items: (Optional) Fix work_orders.py:381 local_estoque formatter to coerce None to '' before f-string concat, e.g.: ' '.join(filter(None, [item.get('almoxarifado'), item.get('prateleira'), item.get('posicao')])) — currently renders 'None None' for empty shelves/positions.
critical_code_review_comments: work_orders.py:341-358 — POST material validations correctly enforce item_estoque_id presence, quantidade > 0, and quantidade <= current_qty before any mutation ✓
work_orders.py:362-368 — Stock deduction recomputes valor_total = new_qty * cost atomically with the update — good ✓
work_orders.py:381 — local_estoque f-string returns literal 'None' when prateleira/posicao keys exist but are null (LOW priority cosmetic bug) — recommend filter(None, [...]) pattern
work_orders.py:394-412 — Stock movement record uses organization_id from item (not user) — consistent so /movimentacoes org filter works ✓
work_orders.py:421-466 — DELETE/devolucao: soft-delete via deleted_at + restore stock + insert movement — correctly idempotent against repeated DELETE since 404 short-circuits ✓
work_orders.py:424 — DELETE requires admin/pcm/supervisor (excludes tecnico) — intentional per RBAC ✓
server.py:457-481 — GET /movimentacoes supports all 5 filters (item_id, ativo_id, usuario_id, os_id, tipo) + organization scoping + excludes _id ✓
App.js:3285-3322 — Materiais section properly conditioned on user role + OS status; data-testids present on all interactive elements ✓
App.js:3257-3261 — 'Última alteração por' / 'Data alteração' only render when alterado_por_nome present — correct fallback behavior ✓
RBAC consistency: POST material allows tecnico (correct — operator consumes from stock during work), DELETE restricted to admin/pcm/supervisor (correct — devolução is supervisory action) ✓

success_rate.frontend: 100% (6/6 UI checks, with 1 LOW cosmetic finding)

seed_data_creation: Backend pytest created: 1 stock item TEST-MAT-{hex6} (qty 10, R$50/UN), OS 'TEST_ITER31_Materiais' (planejada→em_execucao with 1 material consumption then devolucao), OS 'TEST_ITER31_AlteradoPor'. Frontend Playwright created: stock UI-MAT-BCAA7 (qty 20, R$10) + OS #2026-00106 'TEST_ITER31_UI_OS_Mat' with 1 material consumption (2 UN) + alterado_por=PCM Tessio.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bloco 3 (Materiais + Movimentações + alterado_por) fully validated. Re-run: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://procure-manutrix.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration31_materiais.py -v`. NOTE 1: OS POST requires fields: titulo, descricao, ativo_id, tipo, prioridade, disciplina (disciplina was the missing field). NOTE 2: POST /api/ordens-servico/{id}/materiais accepts tecnico but DELETE requires admin/pcm/supervisor. NOTE 3: Stock movements use organization_id from item (not user), so /api/movimentacoes filter works only if user has same org_id (admin in seed has organization_id='' empty → matches all empty-org items; if multiplant org isolation tightens, this may need revisiting). NOTE 4: GET /api/ordens-servico/{id} now returns alterado_por_nome enriched via lookup at routes/work_orders.py:144. NOTE 5: Frontend add-material-btn is hidden when status in (concluida, cancelada) and for gerente role — keep OS in em_execucao for UI test. NOTE 6: Minor cosmetic — local_estoque renders 'None None' when prateleira/posicao are null (work_orders.py:381 needs filter(None,…) coercion).
rca of the issue: N/A — feature working as specified. One LOW-priority cosmetic issue identified (local_estoque 'None None' rendering when stock item lacks prateleira/posicao). RCA: Python f-string substitution of dict.get('key', default) returns None — not the default — when key exists with value None; recommended fix is to use ' '.join(filter(None, [...])) or coalesce with `or ''`.
